name: Checkerboard Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 package DUNCAN HINES Moist Deluxe-Fudge Marble Cake Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine butter, egg yolks, and vanilla extract in a large bowl. Beat until blended. Set aside the cocoa packet from the mix.
2. Gradually add the cake mix, blending well.
3. Divide the dough into two halves. Add the cocoa packet and remaining 1 tablespoon of butter to one half. Knead until well combined and chocolate-colored.
4. Roll out yellow dough between two pieces of waxed paper into a 6-inch square. Repeat with chocolate dough.
5. Remove top pieces of waxed paper from both doughs. Cut each square into twelve 1/2-inch wide strips.
6. To assemble, place one strip of chocolate dough on plastic wrap. Brush the edge with beaten egg. Place one strip of yellow dough next to the chocolate dough, brushing the edge with egg. Repeat with a second chocolate strip and another yellow strip to form the first row. Brush the top of the row with egg.
7. Prepare the second row by stacking strips on the first row, alternating yellow over chocolate strips. Brush the edges and top of each strip with egg. Repeat until all rows are complete.
8. Repeat steps 1-7 with the remaining dough to form a second checkerboard bar.
9. Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease baking sheets.
10. Cut the checkerboard bars into 1/4-inch slices. Place the slices 2 inches apart on greased baking sheets.
11. Bake at 350°F for 7-9 minutes or until edges are light golden brown. Cool 1 minute on baking sheets before removing to cooling racks. Allow cookies to cool completely. Store in airtight containers.
Makes 4 dozen cookies.
